snapshot_binding.note: Derived from the retained nr04-operational-snapshot GitHub Actions artifact. Domain objects and links are reshaped for this Lab and merged at load time by engine/snapshot-adapter.js.

source_note: Real NR04 Golden Operational Universe domain objects/links imported from production snapshot contentHash=e88a298c60b11b100ccb413e314d02c0bd3e175a44fd52bee035015386d47f41. Namespaced with an "nr04:" id prefix so these merge into this Lab's existing curated V1-A narrative fixtures with zero id collisions.

objects.title: PLT-200 Certified Welding Asset Group
objects.evidence_summary: Certified welding is identified as a critical NorthRiver capacity resource.

objects.title: PLT-200 Large-Frame Machining Asset Group
objects.evidence_summary: Large-frame machining is identified as a critical NorthRiver capacity resource.

objects.title: PLT-300 Controls Integration Cells
objects.evidence_summary: Controls integration is identified as a critical NorthRiver capacity resource.

objects.title: PLT-300 Factory Acceptance Test Bays
objects.evidence_summary: FAT bays is identified as a critical NorthRiver capacity resource.

objects.title: EBOM — CPP-1000 Pump Package Rev C engineering structure
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering BOM defines CPP-1000 Pump Package Rev C with pump module, baseplate, driver coupling, instrumentation, and documentation package.

objects.title: EBOM — Impeller Housing Assembly Rev C investment-casting-only component path
objects.evidence_summary: Impeller Housing EBOM Rev C replaces legacy casting ambiguity with investment-casting-only requirement for future builds.

objects.title: EBOM — CPP-1000 Pump Module Rev C subassembly structure
objects.evidence_summary: Pump Module EBOM contains impeller housing assembly, shaft assembly, bearing housing, and mechanical seal.

objects.title: MBOM — CPP-1000 manufacturing build structure for Horizon recovery
objects.evidence_summary: Manufacturing BOM maps the engineering structure into final assembly kit, pump module build kit, controls kit, FAT package, and shipment package.

objects.title: MBOM — Impeller Housing manufacturing kit tied to Apex casting recovery
objects.evidence_summary: Impeller Housing MBOM ties Apex investment casting, repair/inspection routing package, machining fixture, and balance correction kit to the Horizon recovery work order.

objects.title: MBOM — Pump Module build kit with impeller housing manufacturing kit
objects.evidence_summary: Pump Module MBOM includes the impeller housing manufacturing kit, shaft/bearing/seal kit, and assembly hardware.

objects.title: Executive Briefing Source — Week 31 commitment protection recovery plan
objects.evidence_summary: Briefing source collects customer, supplier, quality, manufacturing, logistics, service, finance, recommendation, and decision evidence for executive review.

objects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-033 — Supplier casting containment plan
objects.evidence_summary: CAPA contains supplier corrective action for Apex Foundry CPP-1000 casting porosity.
objects.next_action_summary: Validate containment lot and supplier corrective action evidence.

objects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-041 — FAT documentation standardization
objects.evidence_summary: CAPA standardizes FAT documentation controls after MPS weld-documentation gap.

objects.title: CAPA-NR-2026-047 — CPP-1000 weld process corrective action (PLT-200)
objects.evidence_summary: CAPA-NR-2026-047 opened 2026-08-26 in response to NCR-NR-2026-231 weld porosity; containment effective 2026-08-28; verification due 2026-09-08; prerequisite for FAT-NR-2026-3002 clearance.
objects.business_impact_summary: Process correction prevents recurrence on WO-NR-2026-1101 remaining welds and future CPP-1000 builds.
objects.next_action_summary: Implement digital preheat logging by 2026-09-08; validate on remaining WO-NR-2026-1101 welds before FAT-NR-2026-3002.

objects.title: Material Certification — Apex heat H-7726 for CPP-1000 casting lot C1088
objects.evidence_summary: CMTR confirms heat H-7726 chemistry and mechanicals; dimensional nonconformance was discovered during receiving inspection, not material chemistry review.

objects.title: Customer Commitment — Horizon LNG CPP-1000 September site-ready delivery
objects.evidence_summary: Customer commitment record ties Horizon LNG September field installation date to CPP-1000 demand DMD-NR-GOU-CPP-HORIZON-01.
objects.business_impact_summary: Missed delivery risks outage-window loss, premium freight, and executive escalation.
objects.next_action_summary: Prioritize CPP-1000 casting, ECO, machining, quality disposition, FAT, and shipment recovery.

objects.title: NorthRiver Industrial Systems
objects.evidence_summary: Living Factory Bible defines NorthRiver Industrial Systems as the canonical manufacturing enterprise for OpsConductor V1.

objects.title: CESC-NR-2026-014 — CPP-1000 commissioning delay customer escalation (Horizon LNG Partners)
objects.evidence_summary: CESC-NR-2026-014 escalation raised 2026-09-16 by Horizon LNG Partners; VP Commercial engaged; links to WAR-NR-2026-021; penalty window opens in 30 days from escalation date.
objects.business_impact_summary: Horizon LNG Partners penalty window opens in 30 days; VP Commercial and SVC-400 must deliver field resolution or formal recovery plan.
objects.next_action_summary: Deliver CPP-1000 alignment assessment results to Horizon LNG Partners project director by 2026-09-22; confirm warranty claim disposition.

objects.title: Customer Communication — Horizon recovery plan and outage-window protection update
objects.evidence_summary: Commercial update tells Horizon the repair path passed reinspection, premium freight remains reserved, and the outage-window delivery plan is still protected.

detail.summary: repaired casting released; FAT target maintained; premium freight reserved

objects.title: Rework Demand — Engineering disposition creates CPP-1000 casting repair demand
objects.evidence_summary: ECO/MRB disposition creates a separate rework demand for one affected casting; this demand is related to but distinct from the Horizon customer demand.

objects.title: Drawing Revision — CPP-1000 casting Rev B permitted sand or investment casting (superseded)
objects.evidence_summary: Prior drawing revision permitted sand or investment casting for the CPP-1000 impeller housing; superseded by Rev C after Apex casting variation and porosity findings.

detail.superseded_reason: Apex casting variation and porosity trend

objects.title: Drawing Revision — CPP-1000 casting Rev C requires investment castings only
objects.evidence_summary: Drawing Rev C clarifies future CPP-1000 casting procurement path: investment castings only; existing affected stock requires ECO disposition.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-071 — CPP-1000 bearing housing revision
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering change updates CPP-1000 bearing housing interface before Pueblo machining release.
objects.business_impact_summary: Prevents rework on CPP-1000 September customer builds.
objects.next_action_summary: Release ECN before final machining traveler issue.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-084 — LCM-5000 controls panel layout update
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering change updates LCM-5000 control panel layout before controls integration.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-091 — CPP-1000 cryogenic pump shaft geometry revision ECO
objects.evidence_summary: ECO-NR-2026-091 issued to revise CPP-1000 shaft bore tolerance; gates WO-NR-2026-1101 machining release; closed after drawing release confirmed at Apex Foundry Group.
objects.business_impact_summary: Revised shaft spec unblocks CPP-1000 machining; critical path for Horizon LNG Partners September delivery.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm effectivity with Apex Foundry Group; release revised drawings to PLT-200 machining.

objects.title: ECO-NR-2026-092 — MPS-4000 cooling manifold BOM revision ECO
objects.evidence_summary: ECO-NR-2026-092 issued 2026-08-20 to qualify CPF-MANIFOLD-ALT-003 substitute on MPS-4000 BOM; closed 2026-08-30 after qualification records archived.
objects.business_impact_summary: BOM alignment prevents procurement delay on MPS-4000 cooling manifold; low schedule risk.
objects.next_action_summary: Archive substitute qualification records; close purchasing notes on open MPS-4000 work orders.

objects.title: ECO-NR-GOU-099 — CPP-1000 impeller clearance tolerance update
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering released CPP-1000 impeller clearance update to allow contained rework on affected casting lot.

objects.title: Supplier Shipment — Apex Foundry ships CPP-1000 casting lot C1088
objects.evidence_summary: Apex Foundry ships four CPP-1000 casting sets from lot C1088 / heat H-7726 against PO-APX-88112 line 10.

objects.title: Capacity Reservation — CNC Cell capacity reserved for CPP-1000 recovery
objects.evidence_summary: Planning reserves PLT-200 CNC Cell capacity for the impeller housing finish machining slot ahead of the Horizon recovery date.

objects.title: Customer Delivery — CPP-1000 package delivered within the Horizon outage window
objects.evidence_summary: CPP-1000 package delivers to the Horizon LNG site ahead of the September outage window, fulfilling the customer commitment.

objects.title: Dimensional Inspection — Repaired casting bore confirmed within tolerance
objects.evidence_summary: CMM dimensional recheck confirms bore is back within the 8.250 +0.002/-0.000 tolerance after weld repair and machining allowance.

objects.title: Dispatch List — PLT-200 CNC Cell prioritizes CPP-1000 recovery
objects.evidence_summary: Daily dispatch list sequences WO-NR-GOU-3001 ahead of routine work at the PLT-200 CNC Cell to protect the Horizon recovery date.

objects.title: Engineering Disposition — Controlled weld repair authorized for lot C1088
objects.evidence_summary: Engineering issues the formal disposition record authorizing certified weld repair and reinspection of the held casting under ECO-NR-GOU-099 and MRB-NR-GOU-117.

objects.title: Expedite Decision — Premium freight and recovery machining expedite approved
objects.evidence_summary: Executive review approves premium freight reservation and continued recovery-machining expedite to protect the Horizon outage-window date.

objects.title: Final Assembly — Pump Module integrated with baseplate, coupling, and controls
objects.evidence_summary: Final assembly integrates the Pump Module with baseplate, driver coupling, instrumentation, and documentation package per WO-NR-GOU-1001.

objects.title: FAT Complete — Horizon CPP-1000 package passes factory acceptance test
objects.evidence_summary: CPP-1000 package completes FAT against the checklist in FAT-NR-GOU-6101, clearing the package for shipment release.

objects.title: FAT Ready — CPP-1000 package cleared to begin factory acceptance test
objects.evidence_summary: Final inspection pass clears the CPP-1000 package to begin FAT on schedule against the Horizon outage-window date.

objects.title: Final Inspection — Staged CPP-1000 package passes pre-FAT visual and dimensional check
objects.evidence_summary: Final inspection confirms the staged CPP-1000 package meets visual and dimensional requirements before FAT readiness is declared.

objects.title: First Piece Inspection — First finished impeller housing bore verified in tolerance
objects.evidence_summary: First-piece bore and finish measurements pass, approving the CNC-HBM-12 setup to continue for the remaining run.

objects.title: Hold Release — Repaired casting released from quality hold
objects.evidence_summary: Quality releases the casting from hold after UT/PT and dimensional reinspection both pass, authorizing release to WIP.

objects.title: Kit Release — Pump Module build kit released to PLT-200 Assembly
objects.evidence_summary: Shaft, bearing housing, mechanical seal, and assembly hardware kit releases to PLT-200 Assembly ahead of the impeller housing arriving from machining.

objects.title: Labor Booking — 8.5 hours booked to the finish machining operation
objects.evidence_summary: Labor hours across setup, first piece, and production run are booked to WO-NR-GOU-3001 operation 050 across the two shifts.

objects.title: Machine Reservation — CNC-HBM-12 and fixture booked for the recovery slot
objects.evidence_summary: Planning books CNC-HBM-12 and fixture FIX-CPP-210 for the 2026-08-12 06:00-14:00 finish machining slot.

objects.title: Material Issue — Repaired casting issued to PLT-200 CNC Cell
objects.evidence_summary: Materials issues the repaired casting to the CNC Cell against WO-NR-GOU-3001, consuming the released WIP quantity.

objects.title: Pump Module Assembly — Impeller housing, shaft, bearing housing, and seal built up
objects.evidence_summary: Pump Module assembly builds the finished impeller housing into the shaft/bearing/seal kit per WO-NR-GOU-2001 and the Pump Module MBOM.

objects.title: Priority Override — Planner overrides standard queue to sequence CPP-1000 first
objects.evidence_summary: Planner overrides FIFO work-center queue order to move the Horizon impeller housing ahead of two lower-priority work orders at the constrained CNC Cell.

objects.title: Production Complete — Impeller housing finish machining closes out
objects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-GOU-3001 operation 050 closes complete, releasing the finished impeller housing for transfer to Pump Module assembly.

objects.title: Production Run — Remaining impeller housing finish machining and balance correction
objects.evidence_summary: Production run completes finish machining and balance correction on the repaired impeller housing following first-piece approval.

objects.title: Quality Hold — CPP-1000 casting unit quarantined pending MRB disposition
objects.evidence_summary: Receiving inspection bore oversize and porosity finding places the affected casting unit on quality hold pending NCR and MRB disposition.

objects.title: Machine Queue — CNC-HBM-12 carries an 18-hour queue ahead of the recovery slot
objects.evidence_summary: CNC-HBM-12 queue backlog is the reason the recovery machining operation cannot start until 2026-08-12, even after the repaired casting is released.

objects.title: Receiving — CPP-1000 casting lot C1088 received at PLT-200 dock
objects.evidence_summary: Dock receipt of lot C1088 opens the receiving inspection gate before the casting set can be released to WIP.

objects.title: Recovery Milestone — Reinspection pass clears critical path for Horizon recovery
objects.evidence_summary: Planning records the reinspection pass as the recovery-schedule milestone that clears finish machining to proceed on the critical path.

objects.title: Recovery Schedule — Cross-functional sequence protecting Horizon outage window
objects.evidence_summary: Recovery schedule sequences casting repair, machining, pump module assembly, final assembly, FAT, and shipment against the Horizon outage-window date.

objects.title: Released to WIP — Repaired casting released to work-in-process for finish machining
objects.evidence_summary: Repaired casting moves from quality hold into work-in-process, feeding the finish machining operation on WO-NR-GOU-3001.

objects.title: Return Receipt — Repaired casting received back from Precision Alloy Repair Services
objects.evidence_summary: Repaired casting returns from the certified weld repair vendor against PO-OSP-24071, ready for UT/PT and dimensional reinspection.

objects.title: Machine Setup — CNC-HBM-12 set up for impeller housing finish machining
objects.evidence_summary: Operator completes fixture load and program setup on CNC-HBM-12 ahead of finish machining the repaired impeller housing.

objects.title: Shift Handoff — Day shift A hands off finish machining to Day shift B
objects.evidence_summary: Shift handoff note passes machine status, first-piece approval, and remaining run quantity from Day shift A to Day shift B on CNC-HBM-12.

objects.title: Shipment Released — SHP-NR-GOU-6101 released for premium freight pickup
objects.evidence_summary: FAT completion clears SHP-NR-GOU-6101 for release to the FrontRange Expedite team-truck premium freight pickup.

objects.title: Operator Signoff — Finish machining and balance correction confirmed complete
objects.evidence_summary: Production supervisor signs off that finish machining and balance correction are complete and within specification for the impeller housing.

objects.title: Staging — CPP-1000 package staged in FAT Bay 2
objects.evidence_summary: Completed CPP-1000 package stages in FAT Bay 2 ahead of final inspection and factory acceptance test.

objects.title: Traveler Release — TRV-NR-GOU-2101 released to the production floor
objects.evidence_summary: Traveler TRV-NR-GOU-2101 releases to the floor with the outside weld repair operation inserted ahead of finish machining.

objects.title: UT/PT — Repaired casting weld passes ultrasonic and dye penetrant testing
objects.evidence_summary: UT/PT screening of the weld repair zone passes with no indications, clearing the way for dimensional reinspection.

objects.title: WIP Move — Finished impeller housing transferred to PLT-200 Assembly
objects.evidence_summary: Finished impeller housing moves from the CNC Cell to PLT-200 Assembly to complete the Pump Module build kit.

objects.title: Internal Transfer — Pump Module shipped from PLT-200 to PLT-300
objects.evidence_summary: Completed Pump Module transfers from PLT-200 to PLT-300 systems integration for final assembly into the CPP-1000 package.

objects.title: FAT-NR-2026-3001 — CPS-3000 factory acceptance test (PLT-300 Grand Junction)
objects.evidence_summary: FAT-NR-2026-3001 planned 2026-09-01; readiness confirmed 2026-09-04; execution due 2026-09-07 to protect CPS-3000 Catalyst Chemical shipment window.
objects.business_impact_summary: FAT sign-off gates CPS-3000 shipment to Catalyst Chemical; customer witness availability is the constraint.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm WO-NR-2026-1102 fabrication completion; schedule Catalyst Chemical witness for FAT week.

objects.title: FAT-NR-2026-3002 — CPP-1000 cryogenic factory acceptance test (PLT-300 Grand Junction)
objects.evidence_summary: FAT-NR-2026-3002 planned 2026-09-03; readiness review 2026-09-06; cryogenic FAT requires CAPA-NR-2026-047 weld process verification as a prerequisite.
objects.business_impact_summary: FAT is the final quality gate before CPP-1000 shipment to Horizon LNG Partners; CAPA verification is a prerequisite.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm CAPA-NR-2026-047 verification completion; arrange cryogenic test media; schedule Horizon LNG witness.

objects.title: FAT Checklist — Horizon CPP-1000 recovery package readiness gate
objects.evidence_summary: FAT checklist is held open pending recovery machining completion and repaired casting release into the CPP-1000 package.

objects.title: Revenue Exposure — Horizon, Catalyst, and Atlas September commitments
objects.evidence_summary: Finance exposure rollup ties demand values, premium freight, penalty exposure, and margin erosion to the September recovery plan.
objects.business_impact_summary: At-risk revenue plus avoidable expedite and penalty exposure creates executive-level prioritization signal.

objects.title: Receiving Inspection — CPP-1000 casting dimensional and porosity review
objects.evidence_summary: Receiving inspection found one casting set with bore oversize and localized porosity indication; NCR-NR-GOU-301 opened for MRB disposition.

detail.inspection_method: CMM dimensional inspection plus dye penetrant screening

objects.title: Reinspection — Repaired CPP-1000 casting passes UT/PT and dimensional review
objects.evidence_summary: Repaired casting passed UT/PT and dimensional reinspection; Quality released it back to usable supply for Horizon recovery machining.

objects.title: Foundry Lot — Apex CPP-1000 casting lot C1088 / heat H-7726
objects.evidence_summary: Foundry lot C1088 / heat H-7726 contains the affected CPP-1000 casting set later tied to NCR-NR-GOU-301.

objects.title: Machine — CNC-HBM-12 horizontal boring mill assigned to CPP recovery
objects.evidence_summary: CNC-HBM-12 is reserved for the impeller housing finish machining slot after reinspection release.

objects.title: Inspection Measurements — CPP-1000 casting bore oversize and localized porosity
objects.evidence_summary: CMM record shows bore oversize by 0.006 inch; dye penetrant note flags localized porosity requiring engineering disposition.

objects.title: MRB-NR-GOU-117 — Use-as-is with engineering-approved rework traveler
objects.evidence_summary: MRB approved controlled rework against ECO-NR-GOU-099 for the quarantined CPP-1000 casting set.

objects.title: NCR-NR-2026-218 — CPP casting porosity at incoming inspection
objects.evidence_summary: Incoming inspection identified porosity on CPP-1000 casting lot from Apex Foundry Group.
objects.next_action_summary: MRB disposition required before machining queue release.

objects.title: NCR-NR-2026-231 — CPP-1000 weld sub-assembly inspection failure (PLT-200)
objects.evidence_summary: NCR-NR-2026-231 raised 2026-08-18; radiographic porosity on CPP-1000 outlet nozzle weld; MRB disposition repair-in-place; closed 2026-08-29 after re-inspection pass.
objects.business_impact_summary: Weld repair adds approximately 5 days to CPP-1000 sub-assembly; impacts FAT-NR-2026-3002 schedule.
objects.next_action_summary: Complete weld repair per CAPA-NR-2026-047 containment; re-inspect to close NCR.

objects.title: NCR-NR-2026-244 — MPS skid weld documentation gap
objects.evidence_summary: Quality record identified missing weld documentation before Frontier Mining MPS-4000 FAT.

objects.title: NCR-NR-GOU-301 — CPP-1000 casting dimensional nonconformance
objects.evidence_summary: NCR records dimensional nonconformance on one received CPP-1000 casting set; MRB must decide rework versus replacement.

objects.title: Routing Operation 050 — Finish machine repaired CPP-1000 impeller housing
objects.evidence_summary: Finish machining operation waits for repaired casting release and consumes the critical CNC-HBM-12 slot before pump module assembly.

objects.title: Outside Operation PO — Certified weld repair for CPP-1000 casting recovery
objects.evidence_summary: Outside operation PO authorizes certified weld repair of one CPP-1000 casting under ECO/MRB disposition.

objects.evidence_summary: PLT-100 is listed in the NorthRiver plant directory as Engineering & Product Development Center.

objects.evidence_summary: Purchase order for four CPP-1000 casting sets from Apex Foundry; PO line 10 supports Horizon LNG recovery demand.
objects.business_impact_summary: Supplier promise controls the earliest available recovery supply for the Horizon CPP-1000 commitment.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4501 line 10 — Apex Foundry CPP castings
objects.evidence_summary: Purchase order line covers CPP-1000 casting supply from Apex Foundry Group.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4502 line 20 — Quantum Controls LCM panels
objects.evidence_summary: Purchase order line covers controls hardware required for LCM-5000 liquid cooling modules.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4503 line 10 — Dynamic Seal PPS seal sets
objects.evidence_summary: Purchase order line covers seal sets supporting PPS-2000 process pump system builds.

objects.title: PO-NR-2026-4611:10 — CPS-3000 large frame forging purchase order (Summit Forge Works)
objects.evidence_summary: PO-NR-2026-4611:10 placed with Summit Forge Works for CPS-3000 large-frame forgings; acknowledged 2026-08-11; due at PLT-200 by 2026-08-24.
objects.business_impact_summary: CPS-3000 forging arrival gates WO-NR-2026-1102 fabrication start at Pueblo.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm Summit Forge Works shipment ETD; expedite if forge-line maintenance extends past 2026-08-20.

objects.title: NorthRiver Customer Commitment Value Stream
objects.evidence_summary: The Living Factory Bible defines NorthRiver customer commitments as flowing from opportunity through service lifecycle.

objects.title: Supplier Promise Revision — Apex CPP-1000 casting shipment moves to August 2
objects.evidence_summary: Apex revised PO-APX-88112 line 10 from July 28 to August 2, creating the immediate recovery risk for Horizon.

detail.reason: furnace maintenance overrun and added dimensional sort

objects.title: Recommendation Context — Protect Horizon CPP-1000 through recovery machining and premium freight
objects.evidence_summary: Scenario context links shortage recommendation evidence to supplier delay, ECO, NCR, MRB, machining bottleneck, and shipment recovery actions.

objects.title: BOO / Routing — CPP-1000 recovery route with recursive subassembly operations
objects.evidence_summary: Routing defines receive, rough machine, outside weld repair, reinspection, finish machine, balance, pump module assembly, final assembly, FAT, and shipment operations.

objects.title: Service RMA-NR-GOU-014 — Helios CPP-1000 startup vibration evidence
objects.evidence_summary: Service case provides field evidence that CPP vibration issue may be related to the same impeller tolerance family as ECO-NR-GOU-099.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-7011 — CPP-1000 outbound shipment to Horizon LNG Partners
objects.evidence_summary: SHP-NR-2026-7011 planned 2026-09-08; staged at Grand Junction 2026-09-12; carrier pickup due 2026-09-14 for Horizon LNG Partners delivery; gates on FAT-NR-2026-3002 sign-off.
objects.business_impact_summary: CPP-1000 delivery to Horizon LNG Partners is the primary September commitment; any delay incurs SLA exposure.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm FAT-NR-2026-3002 sign-off date; book cryogenic transport carrier; prepare shipping documentation.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-7012 — CPS-3000 outbound shipment to Catalyst Chemical
objects.evidence_summary: SHP-NR-2026-7012 planned 2026-09-10; staged 2026-09-13; awaiting FAT-NR-2026-3001 sign-off before carrier pickup for Catalyst Chemical delivery.
objects.business_impact_summary: CPS-3000 delivery to Catalyst Chemical on September commit; FAT witness schedule is the upstream dependency.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm FAT-NR-2026-3001 witness availability; obtain oversized load permit; arrange flatbed freight.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-9921 — CPP-1000 shipment to Horizon LNG
objects.evidence_summary: Shipment record reserves Grand Junction shipping window for Horizon LNG CPP-1000 demand.

objects.title: SHP-NR-2026-9934 — LCM-5000 shipment to Atlas Data Infrastructure
objects.evidence_summary: Shipment record reserves Grand Junction shipping window for Atlas Data Infrastructure LCM-5000 demand.

objects.title: Shipment SHP-NR-GOU-6101 — Horizon LNG CPP-1000 premium freight reservation
objects.evidence_summary: Premium freight reservation protects Horizon LNG outage-window delivery if CPP machining recovery finishes by 2026-08-20.

objects.title: Executive Signal — September customer commitment risk rising across CPP, CPS, and LCM programs
objects.evidence_summary: Executive operating review recorded multi-program September commitment risk requiring cross-functional recovery plan.
objects.business_impact_summary: At-risk customer commitments total more than $1.8M across critical September shipments.
objects.next_action_summary: Open Golden Story investigation and validate shortage, supplier, engineering, quality, manufacturing, logistics, service, finance, recommendation, and decision evidence.

objects.title: Supplier Acknowledgement — Apex confirms CPP-1000 casting PO with recovery caveat

detail.caveat: furnace availability and final dimensional inspection

objects.title: SUPQ-NR-2026-051 — CPP-1000 shaft casting dimensional non-conformance (Apex Foundry Group)
objects.evidence_summary: Apex Foundry Group CPP-1000 shaft casting dimensional non-conformance confirmed by incoming inspection at PLT-200; corrective ECO-NR-2026-091 triggered.
objects.business_impact_summary: Delays CPP-1000 machining at Pueblo; puts Horizon LNG Partners September commitment at risk.
objects.next_action_summary: Await ECO-NR-2026-091 disposition; evaluate MRB containment for non-conforming batch.

objects.title: Tooling — CPP-1000 impeller housing machining fixture FIX-CPP-210
objects.evidence_summary: Machining fixture FIX-CPP-210 is required for rough and finish machining of the CPP-1000 impeller housing.

objects.title: Traveler — CPP-1000 recovery machining with inserted outside repair operation
objects.evidence_summary: Traveler adds controlled outside weld repair operation before final machining, balance, assembly, and FAT readiness.

objects.title: WAR-NR-2026-017 — AquaGrid PPS seal leakage warranty case
objects.evidence_summary: Warranty case records AquaGrid PPS-2000 seal leakage feedback routed to Service, Quality, and Engineering.

objects.title: WAR-NR-2026-021 — CPP-1000 field installation warranty case (Horizon LNG Partners)
objects.evidence_summary: WAR-NR-2026-021 opened 2026-09-15; Horizon LNG Partners CPP-1000 vibration during commissioning; SVC-400 field assessment started 2026-09-18; preliminary finding points to installation alignment deviation.
objects.business_impact_summary: Unresolved warranty issue with Horizon LNG Partners during active commissioning creates relationship and revenue risk.
objects.next_action_summary: Complete site alignment assessment; provide field alignment report by 2026-09-22; close warranty case if alignment confirmed.

objects.title: WAR-NR-2026-024 — Helios CPP startup vibration support case
objects.evidence_summary: Warranty support case records Helios Hydrogen CPP-1000 startup vibration investigation.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1001 — CPP-1000 Pueblo machining release
objects.evidence_summary: Work order releases CPP-1000 Pueblo machining activity tied to Horizon LNG September demand.
objects.business_impact_summary: Protects CPP-1000 September customer delivery window.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm large-frame machining slot and inspection availability.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1002 — PPS-2000 fabrication and welding
objects.evidence_summary: Work order covers PPS-2000 fabrication and certified welding at Pueblo for AquaGrid September demand.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1003 — MPS-4000 Grand Junction integration
objects.evidence_summary: Grand Junction integration work order supports Frontier Mining modular process skid demand.
objects.next_action_summary: Sequence controls integration before FAT bay reservation.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1101 — CPP-1000 revised shaft machining work order (PLT-200 Pueblo)
objects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-2026-1101 released 2026-08-10 after ECO-NR-2026-091 effectivity; machining complete 2026-09-02; NCR-NR-2026-231 raised on weld sub-assembly during execution.
objects.business_impact_summary: Critical path for CPP-1000 Horizon LNG Partners September commitment; delay cascades to FAT and shipment.
objects.next_action_summary: Complete weld sub-assembly after CAPA-NR-2026-047 containment; release to FAT-NR-2026-3002.

objects.title: WO-NR-2026-1102 — CPS-3000 large frame fabrication and certified welding (PLT-200 Pueblo)
objects.evidence_summary: WO-NR-2026-1102 released 2026-08-12; awaiting CPS-3000 forgings from PO-NR-2026-4611:10; feeds FAT-NR-2026-3001 at Grand Junction.
objects.business_impact_summary: Fabrication must complete before Grand Junction FAT slot; forging arrival from Summit Forge Works is upstream dependency.
objects.next_action_summary: Confirm forging arrival from PO-NR-2026-4611:10; initiate fabrication once forgings cleared.

objects.title: Final Assembly Work Order — CPP-1000 package for Horizon LNG
objects.evidence_summary: Final assembly work order rolls up Pump Module, controls/instrumentation, FAT readiness, and shipment gate for the Horizon commitment.

objects.title: Subassembly Work Order — CPP-1000 Pump Module assembly
objects.evidence_summary: Pump Module work order depends on the Impeller Housing manufacturing work order and repaired casting release.

objects.title: WO-NR-GOU-2101 — CPP-1000 Pueblo recovery machining
objects.evidence_summary: Pueblo recovery machining work order requires partial receipt, ECO release, and MRB disposition before full release.
objects.business_impact_summary: Critical path for Horizon LNG CPP-1000 commitment.

objects.title: Rework Work Order — CPP-1000 casting weld repair and reinspection path
objects.evidence_summary: Rework WO pulls the affected casting from hold, routes it through certified weld repair, and requires UT/PT plus dimensional reinspection before release.

objects.title: Component Work Order — Impeller Housing manufacturing and recovery path
objects.evidence_summary: Impeller Housing work order is the recursive drilldown point where Apex lot, inspection failure, ECO, rework demand, outside operation, and reinspection converge.
